Quality Education.reason: Focus on legal knowledge and management skills relevant to real estate education.
evidence: 建立對建築法規範核心內容的知識
具備地政相關專業知能

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course addresses real estate management, impacting economic growth and job creation.
evidence: 具備地政相關實務應用與創新之能力
針對建築物常見糾紛具有認識能力及實務處理能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focus on construction management and legal frameworks supports infrastructure development.
evidence: 建築行為與建築物管理使用等涉及土地的合理使用
掌握土地利用管制與建築管制的關係

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Course emphasizes urban planning and management, linking to sustainable community development.
evidence: 提升城市化及可持續人居環境的能力
釐清各相關人的權利義務關係

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Focus on legal frameworks and dispute resolution in real estate supports justice.
evidence: 透過司法判決見解掌握實務上常見爭議
建築法的規範架構與總則說明

No Poverty.reason: Inferred link to Target 1.4 (control over land/property) through its focus on real estate law and ownership systems, but does not specifically address the poor.
evidence: 不動產建築管理與法律

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Supports productive activities (Target 8.3) in the construction sector by teaching legal frameworks for "施工管理" (construction management) and real estate development.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Directly relates to developing quality infrastructure (Target 9.1) by teaching the legal and management frameworks governing construction, such as "建築法" (Building Act).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Relates to ensuring equal application of property law (Target 10.3) by clarifying "權利義務關係" (rights and obligations), but reducing inequality is not a central theme.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Core focus on urban settlement management (Target 11.3) through "土地利用管制" (land use control), "建築法" (Building Act), and "公寓大廈管理條例" (Condominium Administration Act).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Relates to the sustainable management of land as a natural resource (Target 12.2) through the study of "土地利用管制" (land use control).
evidence: 土地與建物的關係緊密

Life on Land.reason: Addresses land use planning via "土地利用管制" (land use control), a key mechanism for integrating ecosystem values into local planning (Target 15.9).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Core focus on promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3) by studying "建築法" (Building Act), resolving "常見糾紛" (common disputes), and understanding judicial decisions.
evidence: 常見糾紛具有認識能力及實務處理能力
